title: Watchtower at the Pass
target: commission a new watchtower at the southern pass before winter closes the road

contributions.line: Veska's meticulous planning falters as the timber they select bends and warps under the strain of the winter melt.
Marek's leadership is undermined by the crew's doubts, as his brawny presence fails to keep the construction on schedule amid the cold.

outcomeNarrative: The watchtower's construction suffers from poor material choices and wavering leadership, leaving it vulnerable to the coming thaw.
